title: dialium unifoliolatum
intro: Dialium unifoliolatum, also known as the African cherry or koko tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dialium unifoliolatum include its ability to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and supplements.
